title: Copper Tools
body:
**==**
![Copper Hoe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/375/107/copper_hoe.png "Copper Hoe")
![Copper Axe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/375/108/copper_axe.png "Copper Axe")
![Copper Sword](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/375/109/copper_sword.png "Copper Sword")
![Copper Shovel](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/375/110/copper_shovel.png "Copper Shovel")
![Copper Pickaxe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/375/111/copper_pickaxe.png "Copper Pickaxe")
**==**

This mod adds copper tools to Minecraft! Their stats are as follows:

- **Attack:** same as stone tools
- **Mining Level:** same as stone tools
- **Durability:** same as **iron** tools
- **Enchantability:** *higher* than **iron** tools
